text.title: C# Background Services Procedure
text.summary: End-to-end 5-step procedure to apply C# Background Services. Each step pairs typed input + bounded action + named output + decision-gate. Steps are sequential unless explicitly marked parallel.

step.name: define-work-unit
step.action: Identify the atomic work unit and its idempotency key.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: scaffold-background-service
step.action: Inherit BackgroundService; implement ExecuteAsync with CancellationToken loop.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: implement-retry-and-idempotency
step.action: Wrap work unit in retry policy; check idempotency key before processing.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: wire-observability
step.action: Emit per-work-unit metrics (queue depth, processing time, failure rate); add traces.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: test-graceful-shutdown
step.action: Send SIGTERM mid-batch; assert drain completes within bounded time.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

section.title: Failure handling
section.p: If a decision-gate blocks, do NOT proceed to the next step. Surface the blockage to the owner with the specific input that did not satisfy the gate. Resume only after the input is corrected.
